message:
fix(cli): kill monitor in buildKillResponse to match runKill behavior

Commit 038a5d67 added monitor pkill to runKill() but missed the
parallel buildKillResponse() code path used by kernel handlers.
Sessions killed through that path would leave orphaned monitor
processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
